title: ZXBrick Leaderboards
description: Compete for the highest score in ZXBrick and compare your performance with players around the world through Apple Game Center.
summary: Every game is another opportunity to improve your score, climb the leaderboard, and challenge yourself.

sections.heading: Compete for the Highest Score
paragraphs: ZXBrick includes an Apple Game Center leaderboard where players compete for the highest score.
Whether you're trying to beat your own personal best or challenge players around the world, every game is another opportunity to climb the rankings.

sections.heading: Keep Improving
paragraphs: Focus on beating your previous best score rather than making huge jumps every session. Small improvements quickly add up as your skills develop.
Leaderboards work alongside achievements and BarkinMad Coins, rewarding regular play and giving you new goals every time you return to ZXBrick.

faq.question: What appears on the ZXBrick leaderboard?
faq.answer: The current Apple Game Center leaderboard tracks the highest score, allowing you to compare your best performances with other ZXBrick players.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Game Is a New Challenge
featureShowcases.summary: Compete for higher scores, beat your personal best, and climb the leaderboard.
body: Every completed game gives you another opportunity to improve your score and move higher up the leaderboard. As your skills improve, you'll naturally climb the rankings while unlocking achievements and earning BarkinMad Coins.
Leaderboards provide an extra layer of competition, encouraging you to return for just one more game.
bullets: Works alongside achievements and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Every game is another opportunity to climb the leaderboard.
